use_cases: Displaying image galleries with scroll-triggered entry animations
Showcasing portfolio items in a dynamic masonry layout
Presenting product collections with staggered reveal effects
Creating visual-heavy content feeds with depth animation
ai_summary: A responsive masonry grid component with scroll-triggered animations featuring scale and rotation effects. Cards animate in from different transform origins based on their column position, creating a cascading reveal effect. Supports custom card data with images, content text, and optional links. Ideal for portfolio galleries, media showcases, and visual content collections.
